summary: Iteration 76 - SSRTE/ICI Alertes USSD Dashboard Testing Complete. All backend APIs and frontend features verified successfully. The dashboard shows USSD responses from farmers via *144*99# (option 6 - travail des enfants) with stats, filterable list, and alert highlighting.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Backend GET /api/ussd/ssrte/responses returns stats (total, conforme, alerte_ici) and responses list
PASS: Backend GET /api/ussd/ssrte/alerts returns only alerte_ici responses
PASS: Backend supports filtering by statut parameter (conforme/alerte_ici)
PASS: Admin login with identifier field works correctly (returns access_token)
PASS: Frontend /cooperative/ssrte page loads after login as admin
PASS: SSRTE Dashboard shows 3 tabs - 'Alertes USSD', 'Nouvelle Visite', 'Historique'
PASS: 'Alertes USSD' tab shows stats cards (Total reponses: 3, Alertes ICI: 2, Conformes: 1)
PASS: Alert items show farmer name, phone, status badge (ALERTE ICI / CONFORME), scolarisation status
PASS: Filter cards filter the list correctly (clicking 'Alertes ICI' shows only 2 alerts, 'Conformes' shows 1)
PASS: USSD shortcode *144*99# is displayed in the dashboard header
PASS: Cooperative dashboard has 'SSRTE / Alertes ICI' quick action button with data-testid
PASS: Quick action button navigates to /cooperative/ssrte
PASS: App.js has route /cooperative/ssrte mapped to CooperativeSSRTEDashboard component (line 232)
PASS: 'Nouvelle Visite' tab shows form for creating new SSRTE visits
PASS: 'Historique' tab shows 50 historical SSRTE visits with risk levels
seed_data_creation: Test data already exists in DB: 3 ssrte_responses (2 alerte_ici, 1 conforme)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SSRTE Dashboard fully functional. Backend APIs at /api/ussd/ssrte/responses and /api/ussd/ssrte/alerts work correctly. Frontend at /cooperative/ssrte shows 3 tabs with USSD alerts, new visit form, and history. Filter functionality works. Quick action button on cooperative dashboard navigates correctly.

mocked_api_note.Orange Money API: MOCKED - payments logged but not actually processed
mocked_api_note.Orange SMS API: MOCKED - SMS logged but not sent

backend_apis.GET /api/ussd/ssrte/responses: Returns stats and responses list with filtering support
backend_apis.POST /api/auth/login: Admin login with identifier field returns access_token

/cooperative/ssrte.alert_items: Show farmer name, phone, status badge, scolarisation status, action required message

route_configuration./cooperative/ssrte: Mapped to CooperativeSSRTEDashboard component in App.js line 232
